title: dryopteris himalaica
intro: Dryopteris himalaica, also known as Himalayan shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus, commonly found in the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris himalaica include reducing fever, relieving joint pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
